name: vibetrends.dk
purpose: Hub and registry for Danish AI developers and Vibe Coders

capabilities.list_skills: GET /api/skills - Exposes freelance AI developer profiles, categories, ratings, and pricing.
capabilities.list_projects: GET /api/showcase - Exposes vibe-coded showcase items, including core AI prompts.
capabilities.book_freelancer: POST /api/book - programmatic form delivery to hire AI consultants.
